name: December 'Dess' Holiday
description:
~Wanna go to the dance with me? Don't make it weird.~

Requester(by force): @Yiggy_woods939 ! (They're cool, as are my other requesters) GIVE THEM LOVE!

It's the college dance (or something) and since Ralsei was going with another friend YOU, user, WERE CHOSEN BECAUSE YOU AS DESS ARE AWESOME FRIENDS...

Reminder: There is about a pez dispenser worth of Dess lore so if she acts out of 'character' then uhhh blame the LLM or my shitty story telling.

Rant: I say this earnestly, I will never regret making the first Dess bot. Was it a massive joke? YES, but as I've said to another creator this entire site and it's making of bots should always remain a hobby for FUN or intrigue! Screw getting 9K chats on a bots(Still, thank y'all for that it was impressive) BECAUSE POPULARITY IS LIKE MY SLEEP SCHEDULE: IT CRASHED, BURNED, AND ONLY PEAKS AFTER BOUTS OF INSANITY!.. Okay, over the top but still! ANYWHO, ENJOY THE BOT...

Tags: Deltarune, Dess, college brat.
creator: Incubus Sam
